'''Tauran Nartal''' was a [[Kajain'sa'Nikto/Legends|Kajain'sa'Nikto]] [[New Republic Special Forces/Legends|Special Forces]] sergeant for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Biography==
Nartal, who was captured by the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Slaver/Legends|slaver]] [[Slar-dan ti Gardi]] on [[Werncin 3]] following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], was sold into slavery. Nartal had been investigating the disappearances of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] representatives [[Krotorra]] and [[Lamorrack]], who had also been captured by Slar-dan ti Gardi. Although Tauran was able to capture Gardi, he was ambushed by the Twi'lek's old partner [[Borun Call]]. Nartal was then sold into slavery on [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]].
